scope: single-seed K=8 dev-only frozen information gate for causal reverse-HPC context evidence; no training, checkpoint selection, stress, formal validation, or test
causal_contract: context evidence queried with sensory x_t is available only in posterior_context_t and may first affect prediction at t+1; primary prior_context_t contains x_<t only
reverse_read: reshape(M_prewrite^T value) into place-by-context, contract with neural place, then multiply by the current regularized context covariance to map the dual write direction back toward a primal context
memory_state: the existing M1b covariance-corrected content fast-weight matrix and covariance only; no second context memory, slots, cache, or persistent content table
shuffled_control: use a fixed per-batch random permutation of query sensory across time while keeping normal content writes and addresses unchanged

classification_rule.SIGNAL_PRESENT_NOT_GROUNDED: causal absolute and margin gates pass but shuffled-value grounding fails
classification_rule.SIGNAL_TOO_LATE: same-step leaky probe passes the absolute gate but causal prior does not
classification_rule.REVERSE_CONTEXT_SIGNAL_INSUFFICIENT: causal absolute or margin gate fails without a leaky-only recovery

post_result_rule: only REVERSE_CONTEXT_SIGNAL_CONFIRMED may unlock a zero-parameter M1g pilot on new dev episodes
